hooks.command: jq -c 'if (.tool_input.command // "" | test("\\bgit\\s+commit\\b")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"Before committing: did this work surface a non-obvious technique, gotcha, or convention that future-you should know? If yes, save a concise memory under your auto-memory directory before committing. If not (e.g. mechanical changes, doc tweaks, dependency bumps), just commit."}} else empty end'

jq -e '.tool_input.command // "" | test("git commit.*Decompile")' >/dev/null 2>&1 && for p in /home/dan/Documents/code/decomp/projects/*/; do if [ -x "$p/.claude/hooks/post-decompile-check.sh" ] && (cd "$p" && git log -1 --format=%s 2>/dev/null | grep -q Decompile); then (cd "$p" && bash .claude/hooks/post-decompile-check.sh); fi; done || true
